title: Ultimate Custom Night

notes: The game runs perfecly, no issues after playing for a couple of hours. The thing is all the cut scenes after finishing a run do not play and the death animatronic voice lines do not play either. The only other thing I noticed was the old man consequences easter egg doesn't work correctly, the demonic sound doesn't play and you have to force close the game. I'm assuming any other easter eggs would also be missing or hidden as well. Other than that it works really well!
title: Ultimate Custom Night
